sections.paragraph:
an unused root [not inserted in Thes.] perhaps i.q. لدن to be soft, flexible. Hence-

I. נָדָן the sheath of a sword, 1Ch 21:27. See נִדְנֶה . [Derivation doubtful]. Of another origin is-

II. נָדָן i.q. נֵדֶה a large gift, given to a harlot, Eze 16:33 from the root נָדָה, with the added syllable ־ָן. De Rossi’s Cod. 409 has נְדָיִךְ for נְדָנַיִךְ.
